rules.section_title: Interactive Notebook: k-NN Example 1
rules.description: Click inside the interactive plot to move the new point. Classification updates automatically.

rules.section_title: Interactive Notebook: Generalized Sigmoid Function
rules.description: Adjust scale a, slope b, and shift x0 in a/(1+e^{-b(x-x0)}) to see how the sigmoid changes.
rules.iframe_title: Interactive Generalized Sigmoid Function Notebook

rules.section_title: Interactive Notebook: Sign Function for Classification
rules.description: Explore the sign-based binary classifier with adjustable class centers, spread, and decision boundary.

rules.section_title: Interactive Notebook: Linear Separating Hyperplane
rules.description: Adjust the weight vector and bias to see how the hyperplane changes in two dimensions.

rules.section_title: Interactive Notebook: Margin Width Geometry
rules.description: Adjust the separating hyperplane and see how the support margins and width 2/||w|| change.
